title: Garden Route Dam level at 45.68%
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS -  The latest dam level update, supplied by George Municipality on 29 December:


> Percentage storage at new raised dam wall height: 45,68 %


Rainfall for the previous week: 16.1 mm(Measured from 22 - 29 December 2025)The Level 2C water restrictions implemented as of  4 December 2025 can be found here.The cooperation of all users of municipal water is essential and is greatly appreciated.

Previous articles:

- Garden Route Dam level at 46,63%
- Garden Route Dam level at 47.65%
- Garden Route Dam level at 49.43%
- Garden Route Dam level at 50,98%
- Garden Route Dam level at 53,22%

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
